title: Notification No.09/2016-Cus(NT), dated 12.01.2016
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 09/2016-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 12th January, 2016 S.O. (E). -In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Principal Commissioner/ Commissioner of Customs, (Nhava Sheva-V), Jawaharlal Nehru Custom House, Nhava Sheva, Tal.Uran, District. Raigad, Maharashtra-400707to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on- (i) the Commissioner of Customs(Imports), Office of the Commissioner of Customs, Jawaharlal Custom House, Nhava Sheva, Mumbai; (ii) the Joint/Additional Commissioner of Customs, Office of the Commissioner of Customs(Imports), Air Cargo Complex, Sahar, Andheri East, Mumbai-400099; (iii) the Assistant/Deputy Commissioner of Customs(Imports), Office of the Commissioner of Customs(Import and General), New Customs House, New Delhi; (iv) the Assistant/Deputy Commissioner of Customs (Imports), Office of the Commissioner of Customs, Custom House, Ahmedabad-380009; (v) the Assistant/Deputy Commissioner of Customs (Imports), Office of the Commissioner of Customs, Tughlakabad, New Delhi, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s Bombardier Transportation India Limited, The Grand Hotel, The Grand Plaza, Ground floor, Vasant Kunj, Phase- II, Nelson Mandela Road, New Delhi -110070 issued vide Show Cause Notice number DRI/NCO/Follow-up/31/2013/100-105, dated the 10th June, 2013by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Zonal Unit, Lucknow. [F No.437/55/2015-Cus.IV] (Z. R. Kamili) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
